text.tspan: # 5,632 confirmed exoplanets — where do worlds like ours hide?

svg.text: Agent active (claude) · driving exoplanets — type instructions here, or use “Fix with agent” on a failing cell

g.text: Colored all 5,632 planets by discovery method and ringed the 24 habitable-zone candidates in
violet. Kepler-452b is annotated — 1.6 R⊕ on a 385-day orbit of a G2 star. Closest match to home.
orgeous — now zoom into the violet band
bypass permissions on (shift+tab to cycle) · ← for agents
